name: Monday.com Work Management
description: Boards, items, columns, groups, updates, subitems, workspaces via Monday.com's official MCP

env_vars.description: Monday.com API Token (personal or OAuth2 access token)
env_vars.how_to_set: monday.com → Avatar (bottom-left) → Developers → My access tokens → Show. Requires the Monday MCP app installed by a workspace admin.

tools.name: list_boards
tools.description: List all accessible Monday.com boards with name, columns, groups, and board metadata

limit.description: Maximum number of boards to return (default 25)

tools.name: get_board_items
tools.description: Retrieve all items (rows) from a specific board with column values, subitems, and updates

board_id.description: The ID of the Monday.com board

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 50)

group_id.description: Filter items by group ID within the board

tools.name: create_item
tools.description: Create a new item (row) on a Monday.com board with column values and optional group assignment

board_id.description: The ID of the board to create the item on

group_id.description: Group ID to place the item in

column_values.description: JSON object mapping column IDs to their values

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Update column values of an existing item on a Monday.com board

board_id.description: The ID of the board containing the item

item_id.description: The ID of the item to update

column_values.description: JSON object mapping column IDs to new values

tools.name: create_update
tools.description: Post an update (comment) on a Monday.com item with rich text body

item_id.description: The ID of the item to post the update on

body.description: The text content of the update (supports HTML)
